parameters.content:
## Approach 3 — grouped error digest

Every 30 min:
1. Fetch all transactions in the last 30 min (Eastern, paged)
2. Find failures (status != Successful)
3. Group by transactionType + status
4. Fetch **BindTransactionLogsHistory** for ONE rep per group
5. Extract the `logLevel: Error` message (the real reason)
6. Post a grouped digest to Teams — only when there are errors

So 18 identical GetBinary_R4 failures = 1 history fetch + 1 line,
not 18 of each.

## Setup (paste 2 values into Session + Filters)
- **sessionJson** — full contents of session.json
- **teamsWebhookUrl** — your Teams webhook URL

## Add Gemini later (optional)
After Fetch + Diagnose, the `groups[].reason` holds the raw error
message. To get a plain-English summary, add a node that sends each
reason to Vertex AI / Gemini and replaces it before Build Teams Card.

## Notify on every run (even all-clear)
Delete the Any Errors? node and wire Build Teams Card -> Post To Teams.
The card shows green when clear.

## Daily
session.json expires (~a day). Re-run node login.js and re-paste.
